name: MOHAWK INDUSTRIES INC
summary: PART I Unless this Form 10-K indicates otherwise or the context otherwise requires, the terms we, our, us, Mohawk, or the Company as used in this Form 10-K refer to Mohawk Industries, Inc. General Mohawk is a leading global flooring manufacturer that creates products to enhance residential and commercial spaces around the world.
